name: Marcos Solomon
tagline: Designing secure, scalable systems that businesses can rely on.
bio: Leads system architecture and visual brand through graphic design.
story: Marcos Solomon leads the system architecture and security engineering at Brivemarc Technologies. His work focuses on designing scalable backend systems that can handle real-world demand while maintaining strict security standards. He has built and structured systems from the ground up, ensuring that every layer, from database design to API architecture is optimized for performance and resilience. Marcos approaches every project with a security-first mindset, integrating best practices early rather than treating security as an afterthought. Beyond infrastructure, he plays a key role in shaping how systems evolve over time, ensuring they remain maintainable, scalable, and aligned with business growth. His philosophy is simple: systems should not just work, they should remain reliable, secure, and scalable under pressure.
notableWork: Designed scalable backend for Solora Market system
Implemented security layer reducing vulnerabilities by 97%

name: Evans Kariuki
tagline: Building connected systems that bridge software and real-world devices.
bio: Develops fullstack applications and IoT systems that power real-time, scalable digital solutions.
story: Evans Kariuki is responsible for building and integrating fullstack systems that drive real-world functionality at Brivemarc Technologies. His work sits at the intersection of software engineering and hardware integration, where he develops applications that not only function digitally but also interact with physical devices. He specializes in developing robust backend systems using Node.js and Express, paired with responsive frontends built in React. His approach focuses on performance, scalability, and seamless user experience across platforms. Beyond traditional software, Evans extends systems into the physical world through IoT, enabling automation, remote control, and real-time data processing. From designing APIs and managing databases to integrating microcontrollers and sensor-driven systems, he ensures that every component communicates efficiently and reliably. His work enables businesses to move beyond static systems into intelligent, automated environments. Evans believes that technology should not just solve problems on screen, but should actively interact with the real world, creating systems that are both practical and impactful.
notableWork: Developed IoT-based smart control system with real-time device communication
Built scalable fullstack applications using MERN architecture
Integrated hardware systems with cloud-based dashboards for monitoring and control
philosophy: Technology should go beyond the screen and actively interact with the real world to solve meaningful problems.

name: Muola Veronica
bio: Oversees design, cybersecurity, and customer experience strategy.
story: Veronica leads the design vision and ensures that every product is both secure and intuitive. She blends creativity with technical precision.

name: Brighton Wandera
role: Android Dev, AI Engineer & Frontend Developer
bio: AI-focused developer building intelligent, high-performance user interfaces and android applications.
story: Brighton specializes in building intelligent systems that merge AI with real-world applications. His work focuses on performance, scalability, and user-centric design.
